title: MAMMOTION YUKA mini 500 Robot Lawn Mowe Perimeter Wire Free, Recommended for 500 ㎡, Maximum 700 ㎡,3D Al Vision, 45% Slope Capability, Automatic Mapping, Equipped with 4G Module
features: Set Once, Forget It:Imagine never having to manually mow or install boundary wires. YUKA mini uses advanced AI Vision technology to create a virtual map of your lawn in just 10 minutes (up to 800 m²). It ensures precise corner-to-edge coverage, cutting within 5 cm from walls for perfect edges. Experience your own personal lawn care solution—set it up once, and let it do the rest.

UltraSense AI Vision: Safety Meets Precision Detects;120+ obstacles (toys, hoses, pets) and invisible boundaries—even without GPS. Its 3D AI obstacle avoidance acts like a vigilant gardener: mows thick grass, avoids hazards.

Conquer 99% of Residential Gardens:Whether your garden has slopes or obstacles, YUKA mini can handle it. With 3.5 cm vertical obstacle clearance and 45% (24°) climbing capacity, it's built to work in almost any private garden. Smart navigation ensures full coverage along borders and flowerbeds—delivering a carpet-smooth lawn every time.

Triple Improvement of Cutting Performance: YUKA mini features a single-cutting disc and floating cutting disc design, with a cutting width of 190 mm, ensuring efficiency and precise edge cutting. Dynamic height adjustment ensures uniform cutting height (20-60 mm) on any terrain—flat, sloped, or uneven. YUKA mini can mow up to 130 m² of lawn per full charge.
